microsoft_ft: Served as **technical bridge** between Azure and strategic enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), scoping resilience workflows into their stacks and scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining **45+ annual drills** and **$14M+ business impact**.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform** across a TypeScript/Node full-stack codebase, defining PRDs and self-service scheduling that cut operational toil **30%** and shifted execution to a scalable, customer-facing self-service model.

Pioneered Azure's first **proactive resilience testing** capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in **4 months** with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new model for continuous customer validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** — joining technical calls to provide credibility and unblock complex deals.

Scaled team leverage through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows that cut planning cycle time **39%** and grew drill capacity **21%**, feeding customer insights back to product to shape roadmap.

Partnered directly with customer success and partner engineering teams on **end-to-end implementation**, traveling on-site for discovery and onboarding to ensure customers realized **measurable ROI** from Azure resilience investments.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows by running hands-on customer demos and training sessions with Azure service teams, driving utilization across **14 key teams** and saving **37 engineering hours/month**.

Shaped product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by leading **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, translating ambiguous customer pain into prioritized engineering requirements shipped into the core product.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by defining metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool (RAG-backed), cutting lookup time **83%** and accelerating engineer onboarding across the org.
Acted as embedded technical advisor across PM, eng, and customer teams, translating complex distributed-systems concepts into clear narratives for non-technical stakeholders driving feature adoption.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions **28% faster** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning **140+ service teams**.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, running discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify **81 hours** of manual effort per region and architecting a roadmap to automate critical paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and measure ROI of platform improvements quarter-over-quarter.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, standups, retros — and groomed the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process across IT and Operations.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to ship automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles **25%** and unlocking faster iteration on fulfillment-center robotics software.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by re-architecting the sales-ops lifecycle and managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for **200+ monthly proposals** through a new CRM workflow tightly integrated with the field team.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost 13%** and lifted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first GTM strategy — overhauling the website, Google Business profile, and lead-capture funnels to compound inbound demand.
Improved leadership pricing models by running profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and feeding insights back into quoting playbooks adopted company-wide.
